title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/selected-node
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/selected-node: node-282x7
Used on: Pod
This annotation records the node that is selected by the scheduling cycle, used by
https://sigs.k8s.io/kube-scheduler-simulator
.

Type: Label
Example:
kubernetes.io/arch: "amd64"
Used on: Node
The Kubelet populates this with
runtime.GOARCH
as defined by Go.
This can be handy if you are mixing ARM and x86 nodes.
